summary: Add the T1b3b main-owned no-owner source reconciliation CAS and resume claim blocker.
rationale: Issue #350 adds schema v9 and one direct RuntimeControlStore transaction because the existing store owns runtime-control SQLite migrations, executor leases, source-operation heads, and BEGIN IMMEDIATE claim serialization. The bounded transaction records every closed main-authored decision in an immutable ledger, advances both operation revisions atomically, and parks only resume-requested runs whose source operation remains reconcile-first. Raw source history remains outside the mutation boundary and production recovery remains disabled.
line_count_rationale: RuntimeControlStore already owns runtime-control schema initialization, ordered migrations, source-operation rows, executor leases, and claim transactions. T1b3b extends that stable storage facade with one bounded v9 schema and no-owner CAS; moving transaction ownership or compressing unrelated code would obscure the atomic owner and revision gates. Store decomposition remains separate governance work.
deletion_targets: source-operation recovery decisions that are not durably correlated to their complete main-authored inputs
resume claims that can race past a durable reconcile-first source-operation head
reconciliation retries that can clear or replace previously committed dispatch, observation, or disposition truth
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest -p no:tach tests/test_runtime_control_source_reconciliation.py tests/test_runtime_control_store.py tests/test_runtime_control_source_operations.py tests/test_runtime_control_event_contract.py -q
uv run --group dev ruff check src tests experiments tools
uv run --group dev ty check src tests tools
uv run --group dev python tools/check_agent_safety_gate.py --base origin/main
uv run --group dev python tools/check_ai_bad_smells.py --base origin/main
uv run --group dev python tools/check_pr_governance.py --base origin/main
risks: Existing populated v8 databases must preserve source-operation and dispatch-outbox rows while leaving no partial v9 objects after an injected DDL failure.
Exact replay must return the immutable original record before owner gates without allowing a changed decision to bypass idempotency checks.
No-owner CAS and resume claim must remain serialized without treating wall-clock lease expiry as absence of an active owner.
This storage boundary does not authenticate raw source history, authorize redispatch, commit run outcomes, or enable production automatic recovery.
